desktop.alemCardText:
FAITH-INSPIRED CARE
Alem

Business and Healthcare Experience

CNA
Business Degree

Alem brings both business and healthcare experience to the home.

She earned her Business Degree in 2005 and has worked as a Certified Nursing Assistant, dedicating herself to supporting and caring for individuals with compassion, professionalism, and respect.

Supporting residents and families with compassion, professionalism, and respect.
